# CS2 Inventory Simulator attribution

The desktop 360-degree cosmetic preview follows the viewer URL contract used by
[`ianlucas/cs2-inventory-simulator`](https://github.com/ianlucas/cs2-inventory-simulator).
The viewer itself is not bundled: the desktop embeds the hosted
`https://3d.cstrike.app` service when the user opens a supported weapon or knife.

The retained upstream MIT license covers the adapted URL-building integration.
It does not relicense Counter-Strike 2 artwork, models, or other material served
by the remote viewer.
